message:
fix(formulas): add missing review_id var to mol-idea-to-plan formula

The template uses {{review_id}} as a computed slug but it was not
declared in [vars], causing TestAllEmbeddedFormulas_VariableValidation
to fail.

Closes: gt-j9tl, gt-x0z9, gt-6lmv

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -406,6 +406,11 @@ Bead graph created for: {{problem}}
 Epic created. Human notified."""
 
 [vars]
+[vars.review_id]
+description = "Short slug for the review (e.g. notification-levels) — computed by the agent"
+required = false
+default = ""
+
 [vars.problem]
 description = "Your idea, feature, or problem statement"
 required = true
